target: com.DailyPay.DailyPay v48.0.0 — Castle SDK io.castle.android v3.1.1 (BuildConfig.VERSION_NAME)
entrypoint_chain: Castle.createRequestToken() -> Castle.id() -> Highwind.token() -> d.g()  (d extends u; real builder is u.g())

publishable_key.format: must start with 'pk_' and be exactly 35 chars
publishable_key.configured_via: CastleConfiguration.publishableKey() — DailyPay passes it from JS/Castle.configure; meta-data key name 'castle_publishable_key' is the fallback path
publishable_key.value: TBD (capture in Phase 4; do NOT hardcode — desensitize)

token_engine: io.castle.highwind.android (codename 'Highwind') — 70 obfuscated classes, PURE JAVA, no .so

primitives_reversed.y.a(int): byte -> 2 hex chars (low 8 bits, zero-padded). Whole token assembled as a HEX STRING.
primitives_reversed.q.a.a(hex,key): xor_hex_strings — nibble-wise XOR of two hex strings, key cycled
primitives_reversed.d0.a.a(hex,key): xor_and_append_key: XOR hex[1:] with key nibble, append key
primitives_reversed.d0.a.a(key,slice,rotChar,data): derive_key_and_xor_bytes: take key[:slice], rotate by int(rotChar,16)%len, XOR data with rotated key cycled
primitives_reversed.p0.a.a(str,255): UTF-8 encode to byte ints, capped at 255 bytes (NO encryption)

token_layout_u_g.str (fp data, e()==2 branch): partHdr + fpMain.data + y.a((bPart.size&31)|((a()&7)<<5)) + bPart.data + motion + this.c(0xFF)
token_layout_u_g.fpMain: f.a() -> a0(data,size)  [main device fingerprint, jadx failed to decompile -> get fields via Phase4 hook]
token_layout_u_g.bPart: r.a() -> a0  [secondary fingerprint part; a()=6 index]
token_layout_u_g.motion: c() -> accelerometer/gyro/magnetic/rotation/gravity/user-accel doubles, each rint(d*100000) as 4-byte uint
token_layout_u_g.strA4 (layer1): d0.a.a(string2, 4, string2[3], str)   == derive_key_and_xor(fp_key, 4, fp_key[3], fp)
token_layout_u_g.str4: this.b(=y.a(10)=0x0a) + y.a(pk.substring(3)) + this.e(version) + this.d(uuid) + d0.a.a(this.d, 8, this.d[9], string2+strA4)
token_layout_u_g.this.d (uuid): y.a(255)-seeded random hex, hyphens stripped (cuid/device uuid)
token_layout_u_g.final: base64url( y.c( randByte + q.a.a(str4 + y.a(len(str4)), randByte) ) ); randByte=y.a(rand(255))

SAME: random-byte final XOR + prepend, base64url no-pad
DIFFERENT_v3.1.1_android: NO XXTEA anywhere: dropped both the whole-token TEA_KEY wrap (+0x0b version byte + padding) AND per-field SBA encryption. Confirmed: zero XXTEA/AES/Cipher/Mac in the highwind package.
SBA (type 4) fields are PLAIN UTF-8 bytes (p0.a.a), not xxtea-encrypted
pk encoded as substring(3) (without 'pk_') and placed inside str4
Section c() collects REAL MOTION SENSORS (accel/gyro/magnetic/rotation/gravity/user-accel) instead of web mouse/touch event datapoints — the core web->mobile difference
str4 leads with 0x0a (this.b=y.a(10)); send-time timestamp lives inside the uuid layer rather than a separate header field
device-id source can be Widevine DRM ID (Highwind.ID_SOURCE_WIDEVINE)
comparison_to_opensource.impact: Open-source DecodeToken.py will FAIL on a real DailyPay token at the xxtea_decrypt step. The container/XOR scheme is reusable; the crypto and fingerprint payload are NOT. Algorithm must be reproduced fresh for v3.1.1.

findings.detail: Castle v3.1.1 token = hex-assembled fp + 3-layer nibble-XOR (time-key slice4/rot3, uuid-key slice8/rot9, random-byte) + base64url; NO block cipher
u.g() token builder; field encoder b0.a(); fp builder f.a() (not decompiled)

open_questions: f.a() main fingerprint fields (jadx failed) — resolve via Phase 4 frida hook on f.a()/u.g()
Real publishable key value + exact str4 byte layout — confirm by hooking token() and decoding a live token
Does motion-sensor section match d.c() exactly at runtime?
next_suggested: Phase 4 dynamic — install on device, frida hook Highwind.token()/u.g()/f.a(), capture a real X-Castle-Request-Token, decode to verify the reversed layout (expect open-source DecodeToken to fail at xxtea, confirming the no-XXTEA finding)
